overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character walking and running through a rain-soaked historic urban district resembling New Orleans. The character navigates concrete sidewalks and cobblestone streets lined with vintage 1960s cars and historic buildings with wrought iron balconies under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with historic storefronts and large oak tree vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk, observing the street and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in green jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive oak tree with spreading branches dominating the end of the street view
two-story pink building with white trim and balconies across the street
weathered wooden building facade with shutters and overhang
tall curved black street lamp post along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a street with sparse traffic. A large oak tree dominates the distant view, while a pink historic mansion sits across the street. The character passes a pedestrian in a green jacket walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk transitioning to cobblestone

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and crosses the street at a marked crosswalk
ground surface changes from concrete sidewalk to wet cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, moving from concrete to cobblestone surface while avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress standing on the sidewalk near the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt road
corner of a beige stone building with weathered facade at the intersection
black metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a crosswalk and crosses the street, transitioning from concrete to wet cobblestone. A woman in a yellow dress stands on the sidewalk nearby. The large oak tree from the previous view recedes into the background as the character moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with wrought iron balconies and brick facades

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the cobblestone street
entering narrower passage with more pedestrians and closer building walls

agents.ego_description: running along the cobblestone street, navigating around pedestrians and parked cars in the historic district

notable_agents.action: man in flat cap and beige jacket walking on the narrow sidewalk, adjusting his hat

entered.detail: vintage yellow and brown station wagon parked on the cobblestone street
decorative black wrought iron balcony railings on upper floors of buildings
red brick building wall with weathered texture and wooden shutters
row of historic creole-style cottages with shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow cobblestone street lined with historic buildings featuring wrought iron balconies and brick facades. A yellow vintage station wagon is parked on the street. The character passes several pedestrians on the narrow sidewalk, including a man adjusting his hat, as they navigate through the enclosed historic district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open residential street into the enclosed atmosphere of a historic urban district. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk past a pink historic mansion and a pedestrian in a green jacket, with a large oak tree dominating the distant view. As the character reaches a crosswalk, the camera follows them across the street, shifting from concrete to wet cobblestones while passing a woman in a yellow dress. The scene then narrows as the character begins to run, leaving the oak tree behind and entering a corridor of brick facades and wrought iron balconies. Finally, the movement carries the character past a parked yellow vintage station wagon and several pedestrians, including a man adjusting his hat, deep within the rain-soaked historic district.
